{
  "claims": [
    "AB 226 ensures the FAIR Plan stays financially stable.",
    "The FAIR Plan is a last-resort insurance option for many Californians.",
    "If the FAIR Plan runs out of money, it could force insurance companies to take on massive costs.",
    "A potential cascade effect from the FAIR Plan running out of money would lead to fewer insurance options and skyrocketing premiums.",
    "AB 226 allows the state to issue bonds to help the FAIR Plan recover after a disaster."
